hooks.command: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo .) && echo '[NGR] Mayor session started' && python3 ngr.py status 2>/dev/null || true
cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo .) && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m 'chore: auto-save state' 2>/dev/null || true
